Turn 6: I don't need anything booked.  I just need to get the arrival time, travel time and price of a train from norwich to cambridge leaving after 21:15.
Turn 7: There are trains arriving at 22:35, 23:35 and 24:35. They are 17.60 pounds and 79 minutes each.
Turn 8: Great, thanks! I'm also looking for a 4 star hotel in the north. Can you please help with that? 
Turn 9: There are several that meet your criteria. Is there a price range you are interested in?
Turn 10: I would like to keep it in the moderate range, please.
Turn 11: I see 7 options. They are all guesthouses. Do you have preferences for internet and parking?
Turn 12: I do not have a preference on those things.
Turn 13: Shall I try to start and book you into one?
Turn 14: Please book it and provide the reference number.
Turn 15: How many nights will you be staying?
Turn 16: Please book the hotel for 4 people and 2 nights.  Thank you.
Turn 17: What day will you be arriving?
Turn 18: the same day... monday please.
Turn 19: I apologize, some of our new workers have phobias of the booking system, I booked you at Acorn guest house, the reference number is 04CSEO7Q any other questions?
Turn 20: That's all I need for today.  Thanks for your help!
Turn 21: I'm happy to help, and I hope you enjoy your stay!
slot_description: price range of the hotel

Turn 1: Yes! City Centre North B and B is an inexpensively-priced guesthouse in the north of town at 328A Histon Road. Would you like to book a room?
Turn 2: Yes can I book it for 6 people starting on Saturday for 4 nights please?
Turn 3: They weren't able to accommodate those parameters. Would you like to try a shorter stay?
Turn 4: Sure.  Let's try 2 nights.  Thanks. I'll need a reference number, too, please.
Turn 5: The booking for City Centre North B&B has been made, your reference number is 0FAFY5PP.
Turn 6: Great! I also need a train from bishops stortford to cambridge, please.
Turn 7: I can find one for you. Can you tell me what day you would like to travel, please? 
Turn 8: The train should arrive by 14:45 and should be on the same day as the hotel booking.
Turn 9: Great, I recommend train TR5108.  It departs at 13:29 and will get you there by 14:07.  Would you like me to book it?
Turn 10: Please book that train for me now.
Turn 11: Certainly! How many tickets would you like?
slot_description: area or part of town where the hotel is located

Turn 1: The address is Parkside, Cambridge, postcode CB11JG
Turn 2: Thanks. Would you be able to help me find a place to stay in the east side of town?
Turn 3: What price range do you prefer?
Turn 4: That doesn't matter. I would like a 4 star hotel though, please.
Turn 5: Would a and b guest house work for you?
Turn 6: Does that place have free wifi?
Turn 7: Yes it has wifi. Would you like to know anything more?
Turn 8: That is sufficient, please book me for 8 people, 5 nights staring on friday.
Turn 9: You've been booked at A and B Guesthouse. Your reference number is I23Q30PH. Can I be of further assistance today?
Turn 10: Also looking for a train leaving Norwich after 14:00 and arriving in Cambridge on Friday.
Turn 11: The TR4828 leaves Norwich at 14:16 and arrives in Cambridge at 15:35 on Friday. The price is 17.60 pounds. Would you like me to book it for you?
Turn 12: Can you please give me the travel time.
Turn 13: The travel time is 79 minutes. Would you like me to book it?
Turn 14: no I don't need you to do that, thank you
Turn 15: Okay, will that be all today or is there anything else I can help you with?
Turn 16: That is all. Thank you!
Turn 17: You're welcome. Have a great day!
slot_description: type of cuisine served at the restaurant

Turn 1: Unfortunately, I am not able to find any Australian cuisine in Cambridge? Can I look up another type of restaurant for you?
Turn 2: Are you sure there are no restaurants that serve Australian food in the north that has an expensive price range?
Turn 3: No, I apologize there are no Australian restaurants in Cambridge. Would you like to try another type of cuisine?
Turn 4: Hmm, I'll try asian oriental instead.
Turn 5: saigon city is one of the best places in town. Shall I book it for you ?
Turn 6: Yes, please book it for me.
Turn 7: What day and time should I make the reservation for? How many people?
Turn 8: Let's make it for six people at 15:00 on saturday.
Turn 9: Booking was successful. The reference number is 30D245LZ. Anything else I can do?
Turn 10: Thank you! Now I need some suggestions on places to go in that same area of town.
Turn 11: Would you like to go to milton country park? They are located in the north and the entrance fee is free.
Turn 12: Sure.  What is their postcode and phone number?
Turn 13: The postcode is cb46az. The phone number is 01223420060. Can I help you with anything else?
slot_description: price range of the hotel
